title: LLMs for Credit Risk Analysis

evidence: chapter.tex:716-729 — Gini = 2*AUROC-1 proof is correct and complete (verified by change of variables; identity exact).
chapter.tex:294-301 — LoRA factor-48 reduction verified numerically (768^2 / (2*768*8) = 48.0).
chapter.tex:662-704 — AUROC and KS definitions mathematically correct; sup attained at observed support point argued correctly.

MINOR — chapter.tex:48,58: bureau coverage and FICO factor weights stated without citation.

evidence: chapter.tex:33,182,420,514,651,878 — each section opens with prose intuition before formalism; good signposting.

evidence: exercises_executed.ipynb — figure cell runs: AUROC=0.6837, KS=0.3476, Gini=0.3673; Gini=2*AUROC-1 identity holds (2*0.6837-1=0.3674).
fig_illustration.pdf present (20.8 KB); caption (chapter.tex:849-857) matches figure content (ROC, KS as max vertical separation = max(tpr-fpr)).
Chapter makes no specific numeric AUROC claim in prose, so no figure/text contradiction.

evidence: Every technique is motivated by a credit/household-finance problem: Apple Card cold-open (35-39), adverse-action reason codes drive the SHAP section, SR 11-7 drives validation, Basel TTC/PIT drives calibration (786-790).

altman1968financial, merton1974pricing, argyle2023out (silicon sampling), simon1955behavioral (bounded rationality), kahneman2011thinking (System 1/2), lundberg2017unified (SHAP), sr117 — all attributed correctly to the right proposition.
platt1999probabilistic and zadrozny2002transforming correctly attributed to Platt scaling and isotonic/score-transformation respectively.

notes: Audit only; no edits applied. Strong finance-first chapter with correct headline derivations (Gini=2*AUROC-1 proven; LoRA factor-48 verified; AUROC/KS/calibration/SHAP defined cleanly within-chapter, so no cross-chapter forward-dependency for these metrics). Fails on 11/14 dimensions. Two notation_crossref BLOCKERS dominate: `def:calibration` collides with ch07 and `eq:lora` collides with ch02+ch03 (triple). Other gating issues: SR 11-7 date error (2011 not 2012), LoRA re-derivation (non_repetition), three uncited empirical claims (citation_accuracy capped 89 -> NEEDS_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION), and reproducibility gaps (stub demo.ipynb + placeholder/mojibake in exercises notebook). The reproducible figure (AUROC 0.6837) is correct and matches its caption.
